## Compliance Checks

**ASCII + Naming Convention:**
- ✓ All 4 files: no em-dashes, no curly quotes, plain hyphens only.
- ✓ Naming: quality-audit-log.md, fitness-loop-2026-06-29.md, permission-drift-2026-06-29.md follow kebab-case.
- ✓ Directory structure: /company/governance/, /company/security/reports/, /memory/wiki/cost-snapshots/ — all consistent.

**Ownership & Versioning:**
- ✓ All 4 files have clear owner assignments (Dalia, Assaf, Rambo, Assaf).
- ✓ Dated reports (fitness-loop, permission-drift, cost-snapshots) use YYYY-MM-DD format in filename.
- ✓ Append-only log (quality-audit-log) has no version field (by design).

**No Retroactive-Edit Risk:**
- ✓ All 4 files are either dated snapshots or append-only logs; no risk of retroactive editing.
- ✓ quality-audit-log.md explicitly states "Append-only" in header.
